title: Base Collection Source
description: A source of collections for a collection list. Supports three selection patterns: distribution identifiers (cross-publisher), publisher-specific collection IDs, or publisher-specific genres.

oneOf.title: Distribution IDs Source
oneOf.description: Select collections by platform-independent distribution identifiers. The primary mechanism for cross-publisher collection matching.

selection_type.description: Discriminator indicating selection by platform-independent distribution identifiers

identifiers.description: Platform-independent identifiers (imdb_id, gracenote_id, eidr_id, etc.). Each identifier uniquely identifies a collection across all publishers.

oneOf.title: Publisher Collections Source
oneOf.description: Select specific collections within a publisher's adagents.json by collection ID

selection_type.description: Discriminator indicating selection by specific collection IDs within a publisher

publisher_domain.description: Domain where publisher's adagents.json is hosted

collection_ids.description: Specific collection IDs from the publisher's adagents.json

oneOf.title: Publisher Genres Source
oneOf.description: Select all collections from a publisher matching genre criteria. Use when excluding entire content categories from a specific publisher.

selection_type.description: Discriminator indicating selection by genre within a publisher

publisher_domain.description: Domain where publisher's adagents.json is hosted

genres.description: Genre values to match against the publisher's collections

genre_taxonomy.description: Taxonomy for the genre values. When present, genre values are interpreted as taxonomy IDs.
